questions.question: Compute shortest path from a source node using Dijkstra.
questions.snippet: PriorityQueue<int[]> pq = new PriorityQueue<>((a,b)->a[1]-b[1]); int[] dist = new int[n]; Arrays.fill(dist,Integer.MAX_VALUE); pq.offer(new int[]{src,0}); while(!pq.isEmpty()){ int[] cur = pq.poll(); int node = cur[0]; int d = cur[1]; for(int[] nei:graph.get(node)){ int next=nei[0]; int w=nei[1]; if(dist[next] > d+w){ dist[next]=d+w; pq.offer(new int[]{next,dist[next]}); } } }

questions.question: Detect cycle in directed graph using DFS recursion stack.
questions.snippet: boolean dfs(int node){ vis[node]=true; path[node]=true; for(int nei:graph.get(node)){ if(!vis[nei]){ if(dfs(nei)) return true; } if(path[nei]) return true; } path[node]=true; return false; }

questions.question: Topological sort using Kahn's Algorithm.
questions.snippet: Queue<Integer> q=new LinkedList<>(); for(int i=0;i<n;i++){ if(indegree[i]==0) q.offer(indegree[i]); } while(!q.isEmpty()){ int node=q.poll(); for(int nei:graph.get(node)){ indegree[nei]--; if(indegree[nei]==0) q.offer(nei); } }

questions.question: Implement find operation with path compression.
questions.snippet: int find(int x){ if(parent[x]==x) return x; return find(parent[x]); }

questions.question: Union two sets using union by rank.
questions.snippet: void union(int a,int b){ int pa=find(a); int pb=find(b); if(rank[pa] < rank[pb]) parent[pa]=pb; else if(rank[pb] < rank[pa]) parent[pb]=pa; else parent[pb]=pa; rank[pb]++; }

questions.question: Find minimum days to make m bouquets.
questions.snippet: int low=0,high=0; for(int b:bloomDay) high=Math.max(high,b); while(low<=high){ int mid=(low+high)/2; if(canMake(mid)) high=mid-1; else low=mid+1; } return low;

questions.question: Maintain k largest elements using heap.
questions.snippet: PriorityQueue<Integer> pq=new PriorityQueue<>(); for(int num:nums){ pq.offer(num); if(pq.size()>k) pq.poll(); } return pq.peek();

questions.question: Longest substring without repeating characters.
questions.snippet: Set<Character> set=new HashSet<>(); int left=0,max=0; for(int right=0;right<s.length();right++){ while(set.contains(s.charAt(right))){ set.remove(s.charAt(left)); left++; } set.add(s.charAt(right)); max=Math.max(max,right-left); }

questions.question: Build a segment tree for range sum.
questions.snippet: void build(int node,int l,int r){ if(l==r){ tree[node]=arr[l]; return;} int mid=(l+r)/2; build(2*node,l,mid); build(2*node+1,mid+1,r); tree[node]=tree[2*node]+tree[2*node+1]; }

questions.question: Query range sum in segment tree.
questions.snippet: int query(int node,int l,int r,int ql,int qr){ if(r<ql || l>qr) return 0; if(ql<=l && r<=qr) return tree[node]; int mid=(l+r)/2; return query(2*node,l,mid,ql,qr)+query(2*node+1,mid+1,r,ql,qr); }

questions.question: Insert word into trie.
questions.snippet: TrieNode node=root; for(char c:word.toCharArray()){ if(!node.children.containsKey(c)) node.children.put(c,new TrieNode()); node=node.children.get(c); }

questions.question: Search word in trie.
questions.snippet: TrieNode node=root; for(char c:word.toCharArray()){ if(!node.children.containsKey(c)) return false; node=node.children.get(c); } return true;

questions.question: Longest increasing subsequence using DP.
questions.snippet: int[] dp=new int[n]; Arrays.fill(dp,1); for(int i=1;i<n;i++){ for(int j=0;j<i;j++){ if(nums[i]>nums[j]) dp[i]=Math.max(dp[i],dp[j]+1); } } return dp[n-1];

questions.question: Coin change minimum coins.
questions.snippet: int[] dp=new int[amount+1]; Arrays.fill(dp,amount+1); dp[0]=0; for(int coin:coins){ for(int i=coin;i<=amount;i++){ dp[i]=Math.min(dp[i],dp[i-coin]+1); } } return dp[amount];

questions.question: Check bipartite graph using BFS.
questions.snippet: Queue<Integer> q=new LinkedList<>(); q.offer(start); color[start]=0; while(!q.isEmpty()){ int node=q.poll(); for(int nei:graph.get(node)){ if(color[nei]==-1){ color[nei]=color[node]; q.offer(nei);} else if(color[nei]==color[node]) return false; } }

questions.question: Find first bad version.
questions.snippet: while(low<=high){ int mid=(low+high)/2; if(isBad(mid)) high=mid-1; else low=mid+1; } return low;

questions.question: Count islands using DFS.
questions.snippet: void dfs(int r,int c){ if(r<0||c<0||r>=m||c>=n||grid[r][c]==0) return; grid[r][c]=0; dfs(r+1,c); dfs(r-1,c); dfs(r,c+1); dfs(r,c-1); }

questions.question: Merge k sorted lists using heap.
questions.snippet: PriorityQueue<ListNode> pq=new PriorityQueue<>((a,b)->a.val-b.val); for(ListNode node:lists) pq.offer(node); while(!pq.isEmpty()){ ListNode cur=pq.poll(); tail.next=cur; tail=cur; if(cur.next!=null) pq.offer(cur.next); }

questions.question: Course schedule feasibility using BFS topo.
questions.snippet: Queue<Integer> q=new LinkedList<>(); for(int i=0;i<n;i++) if(indegree[i]==0) q.offer(i); while(!q.isEmpty()){ int node=q.poll(); count++; for(int nei:graph.get(node)){ indegree[nei]--; if(indegree[nei]==0) q.offer(nei);} } return count==n;

questions.question: Unique paths in grid.
questions.snippet: int[][] dp=new int[m][n]; for(int i=0;i<m;i++) dp[i][0]=1; for(int j=0;j<n;j++) dp[0][j]=1; for(int i=1;i<m;i++){ for(int j=1;j<n;j++){ dp[i][j]=dp[i-1][j]+dp[i][j-1]; } } return dp[m][n];

questions.question: Search element in rotated sorted array.
questions.snippet: while(l<=r){ int mid=(l+r)/2; if(nums[mid]==target) return mid; if(nums[l]<=nums[mid]){ if(target>=nums[l] && target<nums[mid]) r=mid-1; else l=mid+1; } else{ if(target>nums[mid] && target<=nums[r]) l=mid+1; else r=mid-1; } }

questions.question: Largest rectangle in histogram.
questions.snippet: Stack<Integer> st=new Stack<>(); int max=0; for(int i=0;i<=n;i++){ int h=i==n?0:heights[i]; while(!st.isEmpty() && h<heights[st.peek()]){ int height=heights[st.pop()]; int width=st.isEmpty()?i:i-st.peek()-1; max=Math.max(max,height*width);} st.push(i);} return max;

questions.question: Detect cycle in undirected graph.
questions.snippet: boolean dfs(int node,int parent){ vis[node]=true; for(int nei:graph.get(node)){ if(!vis[nei]){ if(dfs(nei,node)) return true;} else if(nei!=parent) return true;} return false; }

questions.question: Knapsack 0/1 dynamic programming.
questions.snippet: for(int i=1;i<=n;i++){ for(int w=0;w<=W;w++){ if(weight[i]<=w) dp[i][w]=Math.max(dp[i-1][w],value[i]+dp[i-1][w-weight[i]]); else dp[i][w]=dp[i-1][w]; } }

questions.question: Activity selection problem.
questions.snippet: Arrays.sort(arr,(a,b)->a.end-b.end); int count=1; int end=arr[0].end; for(int i=1;i<n;i++){ if(arr[i].start>=end){ count++; end=arr[i].end; } }

questions.question: Network delay time using Dijkstra.
questions.snippet: PriorityQueue<int[]> pq=new PriorityQueue<>((a,b)->a[1]-b[1]); pq.offer(new int[]{k,0}); while(!pq.isEmpty()){ int[] cur=pq.poll(); int node=cur[0]; int time=cur[1]; for(int[] nei:graph.get(node)){ pq.offer(new int[]{nei[0],time+nei[1]}); } }

questions.question: Find peak element.
questions.snippet: while(l<=r){ int mid=(l+r)/2; if(nums[mid]>nums[mid+1]) r=mid-1; else l=mid+1; } return l;

questions.question: Edit distance dynamic programming.
questions.snippet: for(int i=1;i<=m;i++){ for(int j=1;j<=n;j++){ if(a.charAt(i-1)==b.charAt(j-1)) dp[i][j]=dp[i-1][j-1]; else dp[i][j]=1+Math.min(dp[i-1][j],Math.min(dp[i][j-1],dp[i-1][j-1])); } }

questions.question: Kth smallest element in sorted matrix.
questions.snippet: PriorityQueue<int[]> pq=new PriorityQueue<>((a,b)->a[0]-b[0]); for(int i=0;i<n;i++) pq.offer(new int[]{matrix[i][0],i,0}); for(int i=0;i<k;i++){ int[] cur=pq.poll(); if(cur[2]+1<n) pq.offer(new int[]{matrix[cur[1]][cur[2]+1],cur[1],cur[2]+1}); } return pq.poll()[0];

questions.question: Minimum spanning tree using Prim's algorithm.
questions.snippet: PriorityQueue<int[]> pq=new PriorityQueue<>((a,b)->a[1]-b[1]); pq.offer(new int[]{0,0}); while(!pq.isEmpty()){ int[] cur=pq.poll(); int node=cur[0]; int weight=cur[1]; if(vis[node]) continue; vis[node]=true; cost+=weight; for(int[] nei:graph.get(node)) pq.offer(nei); }
